title: helichrysum panormitanum var. stramineum
intro: Helichrysum panormitanum var. stramineum, also known as Sardinian strawflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Sardinia, an island in the Mediterranean. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum panormitanum var. stramineum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
